description: Simulate a patient hypotension event and clinical intervention drill in OpenICE. Configure a 'Multiparameter Monitor' (Simulated) with a critical Systolic Blood Pressure and an 'Infusion Pump' (Simulated) with a bolus Flow Rate. Record the time and the specific values set in a drill log at /home/ga/Desktop/hypotension_drill_log.txt and capture a screenshot of the OpenICE screen.
